slovenian: Osnovnošolska ura predmeta družba, ponovitev naravnih značilnosti domače pokrajine, spoznavanje vrst naselij, bivališč, izpolnjevanje delovnih listov na temo značilnosti domačih naselij.
english: A primary school lesson on social studies, reviewing the natural features of the local landscape, learning about different types of settlements and dwellings, and completing worksheets on the characteristics of local settlements.

english: Discussion on the theatre’s programme for 2009.

slovenian: Pogovor o prenehanju financiranja družbeno koristnega dela kot nadomestila za zaporno kazen.
english: Discussion on the discontinuation of funding for community service as an alternative to a prison sentence.

slovenian: Učna ura slovenščine v gimnaziji. Obravnavali so književnost, poezijo. Med uro so obnavljali, kar so se naučili v preteklih urah.
english: Slovenian language lesson at secondary school. They studied literature and poetry. During the lesson, they reviewed what they had learnt in previous lessons.

slovenian: Drugi letnik gimnazije
english: Second year of secondary school

english: Pre-election debate between party leaders.

english: Interview with a traveller from Iran.

english: Interview with a successful Slovenian skier.

slovenian: Intervju z radijskim napovedovalcem.
english: Interview with a radio presenter.

slovenian: Študentska radijska oddaja.
english: Student radio programme.

slovenian: Lokalna radijska oddaja, v kateri poslušalcem izpolnjujejo glasbene želje.
english: Local radio programme in which listeners’ music requests are played.

slovenian: Sestanek jezikovnega oddelka v okviru univerze.
english: Meeting of the language department at the university.

slovenian: Pogovor med tremi zaposlenimi v lovski in ribiški trgovini: o delu med prazniki, pošiljanju voščilnic poslovnim partnerjem, inventuri v začetku leta, dolgovih, strankah, krajah itd. Ker so vsi trije govorci zaposleni v družinskem podjetju, je veliko pogovora osebnega in ne povezanega s podjetjem.
english: A conversation between three employees at a hunting and fishing shop: about working over the holidays, sending greeting cards to business partners, the stock-take at the start of the year, debts, customers, thefts, etc. As all three speakers work in a family business, much of the conversation is personal and unrelated to the business.

slovenian: Pogovor med frizerjem, stranko, ki jo striže, in tretjo (stalno) stranko, ki je prisotna ob striženju.
english: A conversation between a hairdresser, the customer he is cutting, and a third (regular) customer who is present during the haircut.

slovenian: Pogovor v zobozdravniški ordinaciji med pacientko, zobozdravnikom in asistentko.
english: A conversation in a dentist’s surgery between a patient, the dentist and the assistant.

slovenian: Pogovor med stranko in prodajalcem v zlatarni.
english: A conversation between a customer and a sales assistant in a jewellery shop.

slovenian: Pogovor med stranko in uslužbenko ponudnika telekomunikacijskih storitev.
english: A conversation between a customer and an employee of a telecommunications service provider.

slovenian: Telefonski pogovor med stranko in informatorjem v klicnem centru podjetja, ki trži telekomunikacijske storitve.
english: A telephone conversation between a customer and an operator at the call centre of a company marketing telecommunications services.

slovenian: Telefonski pogovor med stranko in informatorjem v klicnem centru podjetja, ki trži telekomunikacijske storitve.
english: A telephone conversation between a customer and an operator at the call centre of a company marketing telecommunications services.

slovenian: Pogovor med babico, vnukinjo in pravnukinjo ob preživljanju prostega dopoldneva. Teme so barvanje slikanice, različni pripetljaji, računanje ...
english: A conversation between a grandmother, her granddaughter and her great-granddaughter whilst spending a free morning together. Topics include colouring a picture book, various incidents, doing sums...

slovenian: Pogovor med dvema prijateljicama o stanodajalcih in drugih dogodkih.
english: A conversation between two friends about landlords and other events.

slovenian: Hči pripoveduje materi o filmu, ki ga je gledala, dogodkih, ki so se zgodili čez vikend...
english: A daughter tells her mother about a film she has watched, events that took place over the weekend...

slovenian: Družinsko srečanje, praznovanje uspešno opravljenega strokovnega izpita članice družine. Teme so prihajajoč dopust, anekdote s potovanja dveh članov družine, zgodbe, ki so se pripetile prijateljem, ter o potovanjih in izkušnjah s turističnimi agencijami nasploh.
english: A family gathering to celebrate a family member passing a professional exam. Topics include the upcoming holiday, anecdotes from two family members’ travels, stories that happened to friends, and travel experiences with travel agencies in general.

slovenian: Pogovor treh članov alternativne glasbene skupine po vaji, teme se večinoma vrtijo okoli glasbe, dogajanja med vikendom in načrtov za prihodnje dni.
english: A conversation between three members of an alternative music band after a rehearsal; topics mostly revolve around music, weekend events and plans for the coming days.

slovenian: Mati in hči se ob kavi pogovarjata o gradnji hiše, službi, sanjah itd.
english: A mother and daughter chat over coffee about building a house, work, dreams, etc.

slovenian: Babica in vnukinja se pogovarjata o prostovoljnem delu pri evropskem projektu, nogometu itd.
english: A grandmother and granddaughter are talking about volunteering on a European project, football, etc.

slovenian: Oče pripoveduje svoji hčerki spomine iz šole ipd.
english: A father is telling his daughter about his memories from school, etc.

slovenian: Pogovor v kavarni med tujko in domačinko, ki se prvič srečata ob tem pogovoru, o vtisih in življenju tujke.
english: A conversation in a café between a foreigner and a local, who are meeting for the first time during this conversation, about the foreigner’s impressions and life.

slovenian: Pogovor dveh prijateljev o zanju aktualnih temah (novem psu, načrtovanju izleta, razmerah v pevskem zboru, njunih skupnih znancih itd.).
english: A conversation between two friends about various current topics (a new dog, planning a trip, the situation in the choir, their mutual acquaintances, etc.).

slovenian: Telefonski pogovor s prijateljico, predvsem z namenom dogovoriti se, kdaj in kje se bosta srečali.
english: A telephone conversation with a friend, mainly to arrange when and where they will meet.

slovenian: Telefonski pogovor med prijateljicama o različnih stvareh, največ o potovanju, s katerega se je ena pred kratkim vrnila.
english: A telephone conversation between two female friends about various topics, mostly about a trip from which one has recently returned.

slovenian: Pogovor med bratom in sestro o tem, kar se je dogajalo tisti dan.
english: A conversation between a brother and sister about what happened that day.

slovenian: Pogovor med parom o aktualnih stvareh in planiranju počitnic.
english: A conversation between a couple about current affairs and planning a holiday.
